description: A public sticky-note quote record stored in a user's PDS and rendered on that user's infinite canvas.

main.description: One sticky note containing a quote, its source metadata, canvas position, persistent rotation, and display styling.

$type.description: Record type discriminator. Must match this lexicon ID.

schemaVersion.description: Record schema version. Version 1 is the initial sticky quote record shape.

text.description: Quote text displayed on the sticky note. Store plain text only, never HTML.

author.description: Optional person or source credited for the quote.

sourceTitle.description: Optional title for the work, article, book, talk, or other source.

sourceUri.description: Optional absolute URI for the quote source.

position.description: Canvas world position for the sticky note's top-left corner.

size.description: Optional sticky note dimensions reserved for future resizing support.

rotationDegX100.description: Persistent rotation in hundredths of a degree. Render as rotationDegX100 / 100.

color.description: Sticky note color token from the app's fixed palette.

zIndex.description: Optional stacking order for overlapping sticky notes. Higher values render above lower values.

createdAt.description: ISO datetime when this quote record was first created.

updatedAt.description: ISO datetime when this quote record was last changed.

position.description: Integer canvas world coordinates. These are independent of the current viewport pan or zoom.

x.description: Horizontal world coordinate in canvas units.

y.description: Vertical world coordinate in canvas units.

size.description: Sticky note dimensions in canvas world units.

width.description: Sticky note width in world units. The app default is 240.

height.description: Sticky note height in world units. The app default is 180.
